name: EaW Pax Chrysalia RPG
description:
Equus ruled by the Changelings in 1014.
Briefly, what does the bot have: Description of the Changelings Kingdom and all protectorates.
Description of the largest and most important cities (With the exception of some)
Character Description: Including all the queens, the High Command, characters from the Canterlot Commissariat, the fate of the Mane Six, the main members of the resistance against the Changelings, and the missing Alicorn Princesses.
Description of all races.
And a few little things.

---
I know that there is another Changeling bot in EaW. But that bot stopped updating, and his Proxy is blocked, which actually ruins everything. So I decided to finally release new bot.
---
Notes:
Use Deepseek or Gemini as a Proxy, otherwise it will not work as it should. English is NOT the author's native language, do not even point out any errors in the text. The author also condemns and does not support everything that needs to be condemned and does not support, he did not want to offend anyone, he does not claim authorship, please do not hit me.

Updates:
31.05.2025 - Added descriptions of some characters from Manehatten Protectorate and Northern Protectorate.
01.06.2025 - Added descriptions to ALL the Changeling generals who were in the game. Most of them didn't have a proper description, and only the place and year of birth, or nothing at all, so I came up with a lot of things myself, adding a small description of their appearance to some.
